title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Structure Brief: Prefix Complexity
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa prefix complexity increment in a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Analyze prefix operations by key length and output size rather than record count alone.
Define Unicode normalization and case policy before indexing or comparison.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
